   "reasoning": "The only thing that'll make a real difference is getting resources to the teachers who actually care about teaching. More money won't help if it's just spread thin, and broad scholarships just create new problems. We need to reward good teachers and make it harder for underperforming schools to hide behind a veil of mediocrity.",
